titleStmt.title: SII 31.227: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 227. (A.R. No. B 327 of 1938.) PRĀṬAKŌTA, NANDIKOTKURU TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Chennakēśava temple.
It is dated in the Śaka year 1590 (wrong for 1589), Plavanga, Mārgasīra ba. 7, corresponding to November 27, Wednesday, 1667 A.D. (current).
It refers to a land deed (dāna-patram) which states that the gift of lands measuring three khas of Taṭimānirēgaḍi land made by the reḍḍlu, karṇams to the god Cheṁnakēśvarasvāmi of Prāṁtakōṭa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1590 Agunē
ṭi plavaṁga nāma saṁvatsara mārgaśira
ba 7 lu śrīmatuprāṁtakōṭa caṁnnakēśva
rasvāmiki svagrāmaṁ reḍlukaraṇālu
vrāśiyiccina dānapatraṁ yī mariyā
danu ninaṁdādīpanaku Āgnēyaṁ tā
ṭī māni rēgaḍi kha 3 Ê 1 nēlakhaṁ
vubhayaṁ kha(2) Ê 3 . pāraṁparyaṁgānu
naḍicēṭaṭṭugānu yicināmu yiṁduku ya
varu Avarōdhana talastuṁnārōvāru tamata
ṁḍrādula vāraṇāśilōvathiṁcina pāpāna bō
duru yiṭani vrāśiyiṁcina tharmmaśāsanaṁ . svadattā
dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ paradattā
pahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 31.227 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
